title: God's Plan
lyrics:
[Intro]
And they wishin' and wishin'
And wishin' and wishin', they wishin' on me
Yeah

[Verse 1]
I been movin' calm, don't start no trouble with me
  > [#1, 196 votes] Although Drake squashed his major beef​, he’s no stranger to conflict. Most notably, he beefed with Philadelphia rapper Meek Mill in 2015 over claims that he didn’t write his own songs. Drake...
Tryna keep it peaceful is a struggle for me
Don't pull up at 6 a.m. to cuddle with me
  > [#2, 200 votes] Drake doesn’t want to be a booty call in the middle of the night—he’s worth the whole night. Aubrey has echoed similar sentiments on his 2007 mixtape deep cut, “Don’t You Have A Man": All my other...
You know how I like it when you lovin' on me
I don't wanna die for them to miss me
  > [#3, 150 votes] Drake is referencing how the general public continuously praises artists after they pass away. Artists like Van Gogh were only appreciated as cultural icons posthumously, while successful musical...
Yes, I see the things that they wishin' on me
  > [#4, 413 votes] Drake has a long history of conflicts. Chris Brown, who allegedly fought Drake in a bar, has publicly defended Meek Mill over legal issues. Meek Mill and Drake had been beefing since 2015, when Meek...
Hope I got some brothers that outlive me
  > [#5, 143 votes] Drake may be referring to his late OVO affiliate, Fif, who was gunned down in Toronto in September 2017. Drake later commemorated him with a tattoo of his face on his forearm a few days after his...
They gon' tell the story, shit was different with me

[Pre-Chorus]
God's plan, God's plan
  > [#6, 236 votes] Drake frequently calls himself “6 God” in his music; “the 6” is a nickname for Toronto (and its six boroughs), where Drake is from, so calling himself “6 God” is his way of expressing his influence...
I hold back, sometimes, I won't, yeah
  > [#7, 70 votes] Drake has had beef with many artists during the course of his career, most notably with Philadelphia rapper Meek Mill. Meek attacked Drake on Twitter for not writing his own music. Drake held back...
I feel good, sometimes, I don't (Ayy, don't)
  > [#8, 34 votes] Drake, bouncing back from the last line discussing his beef, treats it with an indifference. He shows that his beef doesn’t affect his regular life, and that just like other humans, he feels good and...
I finessed down Weston Road (Ayy, 'nessed)
  > [#9, 137 votes] Weston Road is a street in the Toronto area where Drake grew up. He even titled a song “Weston Road Flows” on his 2016 album Views, and on “Still Here" he name-dropped the particular area where he...
Might go down a G-O-D (Yeah, wait)
  > [#10, 232 votes] Drake seems fixated on the idea that death will immortalize him. He mentioned the same idea in the first verse of this song, but it’s clearly been on his mind for a while—he memorably rapped about it...
I go hard on Southside G (Yeah, wait)
  > [#11, 113 votes] Southside may be a reference to Memphis, Tennessee. Shortly after this song’s release, Drizzy proceeded to feature on Memphis rapper BlocBoy JB’s hit song “Look Alive” where he represented Memphis...
I make sure that north-side eat
  > [#12, 128 votes] “North-side” is a reference to Toronto, Canada where Drake was born. Drake constantly shouts out the city in his music, an example being the 2016 album Views, which contains a great deal of...
And still
  > [#4, see above]

[Chorus]
Bad things
  > [#4, see above]
It's a lot of bad things that they wishin' and wishin'
And wishin' and wishin', they wishin' on me
Bad things
It's a lot of bad things that they wishin' and wishin'
And wishin' and wishin', they wishin' on me
Yeah, ayy, ayy

[Verse 2]
She say, "Do you love me?" I tell her, "Only partly
  > [#13, 1225 votes] Drake has a close relationship with his mom, Sandi Graham. He frequently mentions her in his songs, and even dedicated his 2015 track, “You & The 6” to her. Drake previously mentioned not getting...
I only love my bed and my mama, I'm sorry"
Fifty Dub, I even got it tatted on me
  > [#14, 263 votes] Fifty Dub is short for Fifty World, where dub is slang for “w”. This is a reference to Drake’s friend and a member of his entourage, Fifty a.k.a Fif, who was murdered in September 2017 in Toronto. To...
Eighty-one, they'll bring the crashers to the party
  > [#15, 166 votes] This line references Drake and OVO’s ties to the notorious Hells Angels Motorcycle Club (also referred to as A.H., HAMC or 81). The Hells Angels is considered an organized crime syndicate and one of...
And you know me
  > [#16, 377 votes] The O2 is a reference to an entertainment complex in southeast London, The O2, which has a capacity of 20,000. Behind Manchester Arena, The O2 is the second-largest indoor venue in the United Kingdom...
Turn the O2 into the O3, dog
Without 40, Oli, there'd be no me
  > [#17, 314 votes] Noah “40” Shebib is Toronto native, OVO family member, and Drake’s main musical partner as a producer and engineer. 40’s production has become synonymous with a changing trend in hip-hop. Oliver...
'Magine if I never met the broskies

[Pre-Chorus]
God's plan, God's plan
  > [#6, see above]
I can't do this on my own, ayy (No, ayy)
  > [#18, 77 votes] Drake knows that whatever God has planned for him, is for a greater good. As he crosses paths with other people and obstacles get put in his way, Drake can trust that the outcome will benefit him in...
Someone watchin' this shit close (Yep, close)
I've been me since Scarlett Road, ayy (Road, ayy)
  > [#19, 55 votes] Scarlett Road is a main road through Toronto, Ontario. https://www.google.co.uk/maps/place/Scarlett+Rd,+Toronto,+ON,+Canada/@43.683987,-79.5115265,13z/data=!4m2!3m1!1s0x882b36d65ac03c93:0x451f4be4eba4...
Might go down as G-O-D (Yeah, wait, yeah)
  > [#10, see above]
I go hard on Southside G (Ayy, wait, ayy)
  > [#11, see above]
I make sure that north-side eat, yeah
  > [#12, see above]
And still
  > [#4, see above]

[Chorus]
Bad things
  > [#4, see above]
It's a lot of bad things that they wishin' and wishin'
And wishin' and wishin', they wishin' on me
Yeah, yeah
Bad things
It's a lot of bad things that they wishin' and wishin'
And wishin' and wishin', they wishin' on me
Yeah
